software engineer:
We are looking for a Software Engineer to join our team.

Responsibilities:
- Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services
- Write clean, well-tested, production-ready code
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams on system architecture
- Participate in code reviews and mentor junior engineers
- Debug and resolve production issues

Requirements:
- 3+ years of experience in software development
- Proficiency in Python, Java, or Go
- Strong understanding of data structures, algorithms, and system design
- Experience with REST APIs, microservices, and SQL databases
- Familiarity with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure)
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent

Nice to Have:
- Experience with Kubernetes, Kafka, or Redis
- Contributions to open-source projects
frontend developer:
We're hiring a Frontend Developer to build delightful user experiences.

Responsibilities:
- Build responsive, accessible web applications using modern frameworks
- Collaborate with designers to translate Figma mockups into pixel-perfect UI
- Optimize web performance (Core Web Vitals, lazy loading, code splitting)
- Write unit and integration tests for frontend components
- Maintain component libraries and design systems

Requirements:
- 2+ years of experience with React or Vue.js
- Strong proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML5, and CSS3
- Experience with Tailwind CSS or styled-components
- Familiarity with state management (Redux, Zustand) and REST APIs
- Knowledge of web accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) standards
- Experience with testing frameworks (Jest, Cypress)

Nice to Have:
- Experience with Next.js or server-side rendering
- Familiarity with Storybook and design tokens
backend developer:
We're looking for a Backend Developer to build robust, scalable services.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement RESTful and GraphQL APIs
- Build and optimize database schemas and queries
- Implement authentication, authorization, and security best practices
- Design event-driven architectures using message queues
- Monitor and improve application performance

Requirements:
- 3+ years of backend development experience
- Strong proficiency in Python or Java or Node.js
- Deep knowledge of SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL databases
- Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines
- Familiarity with microservices architecture patterns
- Understanding of caching strategies (Redis, Memcached)

Nice to Have:
- Experience with Kafka, RabbitMQ, or event streaming
- Knowledge of Infrastructure as Code (Terraform)
full stack developer:
Join us as a Full Stack Developer to build end-to-end features.

Responsibilities:
- Develop features across the entire stack (frontend + backend + database)
- Build responsive UIs with React/Vue and robust APIs with Node.js/Python
- Design database schemas and write efficient queries
- Deploy and monitor applications in cloud environments
- Collaborate with product managers and designers

Requirements:
- 3+ years of full stack development experience
- Frontend: React or Vue, TypeScript, HTML/CSS, Tailwind
- Backend: Node.js or Python, REST APIs, SQL
- Database: PostgreSQL or MongoDB
- DevOps: Docker, Git, CI/CD, basic AWS/GCP
- Bachelor's degree in CS or equivalent

Nice to Have:
- Experience with Next.js, GraphQL, or real-time systems (WebSocket)
data analyst:
We're hiring a Data Analyst to turn data into actionable insights.

Responsibilities:
- Analyze large datasets to identify trends, patterns, and business opportunities
- Build dashboards and reports using Tableau, Power BI, or Looker
- Write complex SQL queries to extract and transform data
- Partner with stakeholders to define KPIs and success metrics
- Present data-driven recommendations to leadership

Requirements:
- 2+ years of experience in data analysis or business intelligence
- Advanced SQL skills and experience with data warehouses
- Proficiency in Excel, Tableau, or Power BI
- Experience with Python or R for statistical analysis
- Strong understanding of statistics and A/B testing
- Excellent communication and data storytelling skills

Nice to Have:
- Experience with dbt, Snowflake, or BigQuery
- Knowledge of machine learning fundamentals
data scientist:
Join our team as a Data Scientist to build ML models that drive business impact.

Responsibilities:
- Develop and deploy machine learning models for production use cases
- Perform exploratory data analysis and feature engineering
- Design and analyze A/B tests and experiments
- Build data pipelines for model training and inference
- Communicate findings and model performance to stakeholders

Requirements:
- Master's degree in Computer Science, Statistics, or related field
- 3+ years of experience in data science or machine learning
- Strong proficiency in Python (pandas, scikit-learn, TensorFlow/PyTorch)
- Solid foundation in statistics, probability, and linear algebra
- Experience with SQL and data visualization tools
- Familiarity with NLP, computer vision, or recommendation systems

Nice to Have:
- Experience with MLOps (MLflow, Kubeflow, SageMaker)
- Publications in top ML conferences
devops engineer:
We need a DevOps Engineer to build and maintain our infrastructure.

Responsibilities:
- Design and manage CI/CD pipelines for automated deployments
- Build and maintain container orchestration (Kubernetes, ECS)
- Implement infrastructure as code using Terraform or Ansible
- Monitor system health with Prometheus, Grafana, and alerting
- Ensure security best practices across all infrastructure

Requirements:
- 3+ years of DevOps or SRE experience
- Strong experience with Docker and Kubernetes
- Proficiency with cloud platforms (AWS or GCP or Azure)
- Experience with Terraform, Ansible, or CloudFormation
- CI/CD tools: Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or GitLab CI
- Scripting: Python, Bash, or Go
- Linux administration and networking fundamentals

Nice to Have:
- Experience with service mesh (Istio) or GitOps (ArgoCD)
- Security certifications or penetration testing experience
ml engineer:
We're looking for an ML Engineer to productionize machine learning models.

Responsibilities:
- Build scalable ML pipelines for training, evaluation, and serving
- Deploy models to production with low latency and high reliability
- Optimize model performance and resource utilization
- Implement A/B testing frameworks for model experiments
- Collaborate with data scientists on feature engineering and model selection

Requirements:
- 3+ years of experience in ML engineering or backend development
- Strong proficiency in Python (TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn)
- Experience with MLOps tools (MLflow, Kubeflow, or SageMaker)
- Solid knowledge of Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD
- Experience with data pipeline tools (Airflow, Spark)
- Cloud platform experience (AWS or GCP)

Nice to Have:
- Experience with real-time inference and model optimization (ONNX, TensorRT)
- Background in deep learning or NLP
qa engineer:
We're hiring a QA Engineer to ensure product quality across our platform.

Responsibilities:
- Design and execute manual and automated test strategies
- Build and maintain automated test suites (UI + API)
- Write and maintain test cases, test plans, and bug reports
- Perform regression, integration, and performance testing
- Collaborate with developers to identify and resolve defects

Requirements:
- 2+ years of QA or test automation experience
- Experience with Selenium, Cypress, or Playwright
- API testing with Postman, REST Assured, or similar tools
- Programming skills in Python or Java
- Familiarity with Jira, Git, and CI/CD pipelines
- Knowledge of test-driven development and BDD (Cucumber)

Nice to Have:
- Experience with performance testing (JMeter, k6)
- Mobile testing experience (Appium)
product manager:
We're looking for a Product Manager to drive product strategy and execution.

Responsibilities:
- Define product vision, strategy, and roadmap
- Gather and prioritize requirements from stakeholders and customers
- Write clear user stories, acceptance criteria, and PRDs
- Lead sprint planning, standups, and retrospectives
- Analyze product metrics and make data-driven decisions

Requirements:
- 3+ years of product management experience
- Strong understanding of Agile/Scrum methodologies
- Experience with Jira, Confluence, and product analytics tools
- Data literacy: SQL, A/B testing, funnel analysis
- Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills
- Experience creating product roadmaps and OKRs

Nice to Have:
- Technical background (CS degree or engineering experience)
- Experience with design tools (Figma, Miro)
data engineer:
Join us as a Data Engineer to build the data infrastructure that powers our analytics.

Responsibilities:
- Design and build scalable ETL/ELT data pipelines
- Architect and maintain data warehouses and data lakes
- Optimize query performance and data storage costs
- Implement data quality checks and monitoring
- Collaborate with data scientists and analysts on data needs

Requirements:
- 3+ years of data engineering experience
- Strong proficiency in Python and SQL
- Experience with Spark, Airflow, or dbt
- Knowledge of data warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift)
- Familiarity with streaming systems (Kafka, Kinesis)
- Cloud platform experience (AWS or GCP)

Nice to Have:
- Experience with Databricks or Delta Lake
- Knowledge of data governance and data mesh architectures
mobile developer:
We're hiring a Mobile Developer to build native and cross-platform apps.

Responsibilities:
- Develop and maintain mobile applications for iOS and Android
- Implement responsive UI designs with smooth animations
- Integrate with REST APIs and handle offline data sync
- Optimize app performance, battery usage, and startup time
- Publish and maintain apps on App Store and Google Play

Requirements:
- 2+ years of mobile development experience
- Experience with React Native or Flutter (cross-platform)
- OR native development with Swift/SwiftUI (iOS) or Kotlin (Android)
- Familiarity with REST APIs, JSON, and mobile state management
- Knowledge of app store submission and release processes
- Experience with Git and mobile CI/CD

Nice to Have:
- Experience with Firebase, push notifications, or deep linking
- Knowledge of mobile security and authentication patterns
